name: Pickled Crab-Apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Select firm, well-ripened crab-apples.
2. Wash the apples thoroughly.
3. Do not pare or remove stems.
4. Remove any blossom ends.
5. Prick the skin of each apple to prevent it from bursting during cooking.
6. Cook the apples slowly in a pickling syrup made with equal parts sugar and vinegar until they are tender.
7. Allow the apples to cool before serving.
